site:settings.description: Revolutionizing the cadence of Kannada cinema. His artistic vision serves as the foundation for the acoustic layout, tracking spaces, and color design of Iyedani Entertainment.
site:settings.address: 2nd Floor, 1092/93, 10th C Cross, 11th Main Rd, Stage 2, Mahalakshmipuram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560086
site:settings.aboutText1: IYDANI ENTERTAINMENT is the golden dream envisioned by Dr. Hamsalekha, He is a great visionary, musician, lyricist, artist, performer, singer, instrumentalist, composer, educationist, philanthropist, socialist, patron of literature and art, teacher and a marvelous human being.
site:settings.aboutText2: Apart from him being always recognized with the film industry he is the visionary who dreamt of having a systematic study pattern for Indian Folk Music in India. To safeguard and promote DESI culture he endorsed Desi Notations to help learn Indian Music better. Driven by ambition, he put forth several ideas which went into creating their own record label Hamsalekha Strings & Iydani Entertainment.

team.name: Iydani Founder
team.bio: Visionary entrepreneur driving the integration of classic musical heritage with state-of-the-art cinematic technology.

team.name: Dr. Hamsalekha
team.bio: Naada Brahma of Kannada cinema, shaping the acoustic philosophy and artistic standards of the studio.

team.name: Technical Director
team.bio: A veteran engineer with over 15 years of experience setting up premium recording chains and virtual productions.

entertainmentServices.title: Film Production
entertainmentServices.desc: End-to-end cinema production from script development and pre-visualization to filming, VFX, and theater packaging.

entertainmentServices.title: Music Production
entertainmentServices.desc: Full songwriting, arranging, tracking, and mixing with legendary director mentorship for albums and movie soundtracks.

entertainmentServices.title: Music Distribution & Label
entertainmentServices.desc: Seamless publishing across major streaming platforms worldwide (Spotify, Apple Music, JioSaavn) under the Iydani Audio Label.

entertainmentServices.title: Artist Management
entertainmentServices.desc: Mentoring rising vocalists and composers, booking gigs, setting up licensing deals, and guiding media careers.

entertainmentServices.title: Digital Content Creation
entertainmentServices.desc: Premium brand campaigns, high-end promotional videos, motion assets, and commercial layouts.

studioServices.title: Acoustic Tracking & Recording
studioServices.desc: Premium tracking room optimized for live drums, string ensembles, and vocal capture with Class-A analog chains.

studioServices.title: Dubbing & Dialogue Replacement
studioServices.desc: Sound-isolated ADR suites with precise timecode sync for movie and commercial language localization.

studioServices.title: Cinematic Color Grading
studioServices.desc: DaVinci Resolve color-grading suite with D65 lighting and reference monitors for UHD/HDR master exports.

studioServices.title: Cinema Green Screen Studio
studioServices.desc: Pre-lit cyclorama chroma key space with high-CRI panels, dolly track systems, and virtual tracking overlays.

studioServices.title: Dolby Atmos Mixing & Post
studioServices.desc: Spatial audio mix room optimized for cinema standard surround mixes, audio cleanup, and sound design.

privacy-policy:
# Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 09, 2026

We value your privacy. Your contact and career application submissions are securely stored and processed in compliance with modern data security practices. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.
